app.subtitle: Unconscious pattern analysis
app.name: Ozero's Mirror
app.line1: No consolation — just an accurate reflection.
app.line2: Keep only the facts. The problem is usually smaller than the story.
app.tagline: Training to separate fact from delusion in your own record.

measure.guide1:
No need to write well.
It doesn't have to be sentences.
measure.guide2:
Write whatever comes up, honestly and boldly.
Swearing is fine. Don't mind the spelling.
measure.guide3:
Don't edit, don't censor —
pour it out.
measure.guide4: There is no right or wrong writing.
measure.factsEmpty: Write at least one line in the facts box.
measure.factsTitle: Now, sort out only the facts, feelings, and actions.
measure.factDef:
The test for a fact:
What a camera and a recorder would capture
What can be stated with specific names and numbers
What 1,000 people would all state the same way
measure.delusionDef:
A delusion is what gets layered on top — judgment, evaluation, guess, opinion, imagination.
A delusion is neither good nor bad.
It is simply an indicator of how
you interpret the world.
measure.example1:
Example)
"I can't buy it because I have no money" is a delusion.
The fact is "My wallet has 0 dollars in it."
measure.example2:
"I stayed at a nice hotel" is a delusion.
The fact is "I stayed at the Ritz-Carlton."
'Nice' is an adjective you added.
measure.feelingsHelp:
Write what rose in your body or mind in that moment.
Chest tightening, face flushing.
Feelings are never right or wrong.
measure.actionsHelp:
Write what you actually did and how you reacted.
What you said, how you moved.
(Doing nothing is also an action.)
measure.toMirror: Hold it up to the mirror
measure.resultTitle: The mirror looked at your facts box.
measure.clean: Every sentence here would be caught on camera.
measure.unclear: Which side would you place this on?
measure.mirrorRatio: The mirror splits it as fact {f} : delusion {d}.
measure.limit: That's all for today. You can mirror again tomorrow.
measure.recallNoAnswer: Yesterday's question was left unanswered. On to today's record.

save.prompt: This question does not end here.
save.hint: Get an Ozero ID — tomorrow, at the time you choose, today's answer comes back with the mirror's reading of it. Keep three days and the mirror reflects what repeats. No address, no password.
save.existing: I already have an Ozero ID
save.doneTime: Tomorrow at {t}, today's answer comes back with its mirror.
save.savedToday: Today's mirror is kept. Tomorrow your answer comes back with its mirror.
save.codeInvalid: That ID format is not right. Example: o023
save.codeTaken: That ID is already registered. If you're new, get a fresh ID.
save.failed: Could not save. Please try again.

me.title: My mirror
me.none: You don't have an Ozero ID yet.
me.deliverAt: The mirror opens at {t} each day.

today.building: Today's dial — built in the next step.
